texto: He is Running and Shouting and teasing around ,people know that he is just a vamp on the ground. people no more fear him . But the one sitting silent with no sigh of talky move,people simply fear him because no one knows what destruction he can bring to one in the this bushy grass of violence.
explicacao: Citação de yash hoskere sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “He is Running and Shouting and teasing around ,people know that he is just a vamp on the ground. …” articula reflexao, silence, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e reflexao.
